message.thinking:

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No.

So all three are false. Provide feedback: highlight problems: placeholder, no listing, no description, no structure. Provide feedback accordingly.

Return JSON array with three objects. Each object has "question" field with "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback: "The text contains only a placeholder 'TODO' and does not list or describe any sections, so it fails to meet the criteria." For each.

Let's craft.
